title: No recursion depth guard for future nested workflow invocation (Phase 6)
body: The workflow: field on StepSpec is parsed but rejected at validation time (Phase 6 — not yet implemented). When unblocked, nested workflow invocation will allow unbounded recursive spawning without a depth guard. pi-subagents' pattern: PI_SUBAGENT_MAX_DEPTH env var propagated via PI_SUBAGENT_DEPTH in child process env. Must be in place before workflow: steps are enabled.
